name: tap
usage: Primary selection and activation of controls

name: double-tap
usage: Secondary action or zoom toggle on content

name: long-press
usage: Context menu presentation and drag initiation

name: swipe
usage: Directional navigation or reveal of swipe actions

name: edge-pan
usage: Back navigation via screen left-edge pan gesture

name: pinch
usage: Zoom in and out on maps images and content

name: rotation
usage: Rotate maps images and placed objects

name: drag
usage: Reorder list items or drag-and-drop between apps

name: haptic-touch
usage: Peek preview via long press replacing 3D Touch

name: scroll-momentum
usage: Inertial scrolling with rubber-band bounce at edges
